references.name: Bento Grids Gallery
observedPatterns: Modular card grids with varying column spans
Gradient accent headers on feature cards
Rounded corners with subtle drop shadows
adaptedElements: Magazine-style tile layout with gradient top-borders on feature tiles
Medium density spacing between tiles for breathing room

references.name: Linear App
observedPatterns: Clean top-bar navigation with horizontal tabs
Warm neutral backgrounds with white surface cards
adaptedElements: Sticky top bar with gradient underline indicators on active tab
Clean card-based content organization with hover-expand interactions

references.name: Notion
observedPatterns: Content-first editorial approach to workspace tools
adaptedElements: Workspace document editor with floating toolbar
